expr: (async () => { const set=(s,v)=>{const e=document.querySelector(s);e.value=v;e.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}))}; set('#f-tenant','Rahul Verma'); set('#f-landlord','S. Iyer'); set('#f-pan','ABCDE1234F'); set('#f-address','Flat 4B, Marine Drive, Mumbai'); set('#f-rent','25000'); set('#f-from','2025-04'); set('#f-to','2026-03'); set('#f-mode','Cash'); await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,600)); const pages=document.querySelectorAll('.pv-page').length; const texts=[...document.querySelectorAll('.pv-text')].map(e=>e.textContent); return {pages, words: texts.some(t=>t.includes('Twenty-Five Thousand Rupees')), stampNote: texts.some(t=>t.includes('revenue stamp')), pan: texts.some(t=>t.includes('ABCDE1234F'))}; })()

(async () => { const set=(s,v)=>{const e=document.querySelector(s);e.value=v;e.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}))}; set('#f-company','Acme India'); set('#f-employee','Priya Shah'); const amts=document.querySelectorAll('#earnings-rows .r-amount'); amts[0].value='50000'; amts[0].dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true})); amts[1].value='20000'; amts[1].dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true})); const ded=document.querySelectorAll('#deductions-rows .r-amount'); ded[0].value='1800'; ded[0].dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true})); await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,600)); const texts=[...document.querySelectorAll('.pv-text')].map(e=>e.textContent); return {pages:document.querySelectorAll('.pv-page').length, net: texts.some(t=>t.includes('68,200')), words: texts.some(t=>t.includes('Sixty-Eight Thousand Two Hundred Rupees'))}; })()

(async () => { const set=(s,v)=>{const e=document.querySelector(s);e.value=v;e.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}))}; set('#f-name','Sam Lee'); set('#f-client','Globex'); set('#f-rate','100'); const h=document.querySelectorAll('.d-hours'); h[0].value='8'; h[0].dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true})); h[1].value='6.5'; h[1].dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true})); await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,600)); const texts=[...document.querySelectorAll('.pv-text')].map(e=>e.textContent); return {pages:document.querySelectorAll('.pv-page').length, total: texts.some(t=>t==='14.5'), amount: texts.some(t=>t.includes('1,450'))}; })()

(async () => { const set=(s,v)=>{const e=document.querySelector(s);e.value=v;e.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}))}; set('#f-name','Sam Lee'); set('#f-advance','100'); const a=document.querySelector('.e-amount'); a.value='450'; a.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true})); await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,600)); const texts=[...document.querySelectorAll('.pv-text')].map(e=>e.textContent); return {pages:document.querySelectorAll('.pv-page').length, reimb: texts.some(t=>t.includes('350'))}; })()

(async () => { const set=(s,v)=>{const e=document.querySelector(s);e.value=v;e.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}))}; set('#f-name','Sterling & Co'); set('#f-email','hello@sterling.co'); set('#f-style','centered'); set('#f-body','Dear Sir,\n\nThis is to confirm our engagement.'); await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,600)); const texts=[...document.querySelectorAll('.pv-text')].map(e=>e.textContent); return {pages:document.querySelectorAll('.pv-page').length, name: texts.some(t=>t.includes('Sterling')), body: texts.some(t=>t.includes('engagement'))}; })()

(async () => { const set=(s,v)=>{const e=document.querySelector(s);e.value=v;e.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}))}; set('[data-bind="extra.incoterms"]','CIF Rotterdam'); set('.i-hsn','851713'); await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,500)); const texts=[...document.querySelectorAll('.pv-text')].map(e=>e.textContent); return {pages:document.querySelectorAll('.pv-page').length, incoterms: texts.some(t=>t.includes('CIF Rotterdam')), hsCol: texts.some(t=>t.includes('HS CODE')||t.includes('HS Code')), hsVal: texts.some(t=>t==='851713')}; })()
